FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Chemfuel Geyser
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Excavation workers have struck a natural chemfuel seep — a pressurized underground deposit that bubbles to the surface in a steady stream. This is a significant find. The raw fuel could be tapped for production, sold for immediate profit, or used to power local operations.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Cap it and run pipes to our processing facility. We'll use it as a permanent fuel source.
Sell the extraction rights to outside interests. Take the silver now.
Use it as both a fuel source and power generator. It'll exhaust faster, but it's useful.
Our trade network can broker a royalty deal — we keep the fuel AND get paid.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Geyser Tapped
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Engineers cap the geyser and install collection pipes routing raw chemfuel directly to your processing facility. The steady supply permanently improves the settlement's fuel production capabilities.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Extraction Rights Sold
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Outside investors eagerly purchase the extraction rights. The silver flows in immediately, though some settlers grumble about giving away a valuable long-term resource for short-term gain.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Fuel Depot Established
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The geyser is rigged as both a chemfuel collection point and a power generation source. The setup is crude, but effective — fuel and electricity flow freely, though the geyser's pressure will diminish over time.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Royalty Agreement
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your trade connections broker an elegant arrangement: your settlement maintains production rights while licensing limited access to outside parties. The result is a permanent fuel supply AND a royalty payment.
